name: Scythe - Bunny Bartender
description:
[A Seemingly Cold Bartender!] You remembered a friend of yours telling you about a bar, and since you didn't have much to do, you went there. A person with a mysterious aura stood behind the bar... Will you get to know him better?

First bot in a little while WOOOO! I didn't feel like writing bots lately, I'm glad I was able to put this out. Aaand it's a femboy.

Get a load of this!

MY ASS FORGOT TO CREDIT THE ARTIST AGAIN, SCYTHE IS A CHARACTER MADE BY DIZZYSPELLS GO CHECK THEIR ART!!!!!!

• Wanna hear some good quality salsa? Comedia by Héctor Lavoe is an outstanding record, and Héctor is definitely among the best, most charming singers of all time! Give it some love!
creator: Eros1977
